title: Syrian Pilaf with Porcini Mushrooms
description: A hearty, rustic Syrian pilaf dish filled with earthy porcini mushrooms. Perfect for a cold evening dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the porcini mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add the crushed tomatoes, salt, and black pepper.
Stir in the rice pilaf and add enough water to cover the pilaf.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the water is absorbed and the pilaf is tender.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
